topic: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)

questions.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
questions.english: I wish I had more money.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Wish/If only + subject + past simple (present regret) | Wish/If only + subject + past perfect (past regret)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I wish I had more money."
questions.grammarRule: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)
questions.category: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) practice
